subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. We would be glad to schedule a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

The following slots are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which option works best for you, and we can coordinate accordingly.

Regarding internal contact details, we are not able to share internal directories or direct email or phone information. Please use our public website for the appropriate contact channels.

Best regards,
